topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into RTOS. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: RTOS is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing RTOS in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given RTOS snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of RTOS?
How does RTOS handle memory management?
